arts.ttl: Club need Champions League to sign player from Chelsea – Big debut creates excitement
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will need to qualify for the Champions League this season if they are to sign Carney Chukwuemeka from Chelsea this summer. That’s according to Sky Germany and BILD, who both say the German side have no chance of activating a €35m clause for the midfielder if they don’t get into the Champions League.
